prompt: Directions: Write a short essay on the topic of online learning. You should state the advantages and give your opinion. You should write at least 120 words but no more than 180 words.
essay_text:
Nowadays, online learning has become more and more popular. Many people choose to learn on the internet instead of traditional classroom. There are both advantages and problems.

First, online learning is very convenient. We can learn at any time and any place. We don't need to go to school, so we can save a lot of time. Second, there are many resources online. We can find videos, articles, and courses from all over the world. This makes learning more interesting.

However, online learning also have some problems. Some students may not have good self-control. They may play games instead of study. Also, staring at screen for long time is bad for our eyes.

In my opinion, online learning is a good tool, but we should use it wisely. Schools should combine online and offline learning together. I believe this is the best way for students.

annotations.comment: 缺少冠词 → instead of the traditional classroom

annotations.highlight: online learning also have some problems
annotations.comment: 主谓不一致：online learning (单数) → has
介词后应用动名词 → instead of studying

annotations.highlight: staring at screen for long time
annotations.comment: 冠词遗漏 → staring at a screen for a long time

annotations.highlight: combine online and offline learning together
annotations.comment: combine...together 冗余 → combine A and B
